title: Craftable LightSources
description: adds a crafting recipe for the hidden light sources into survival!
body:
# Craftable LightSources

Isn't it awfull to 'torchspam' your pretty build, just to stop it from spawning a LOT of creepers? Well, I agree!
Now, you can light up your builds using the -otherwise unobtainable- hidden light block!

# Crafting

Simply combine Glowstone Dust, Prismarine Crystals, and Glow Ink Sacs in your crafting grid, and obtain 3 'light blocks'

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d98c2f898859d8c33db22a0b8bf11cedb342670.png)

To change what light level this block gives off, pop it into a StoneCutter!

![Chaning the Light Level!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0879e76d2231027bf32bfb893d8d3347bed923b.png)

_This feature is available from the 1.21 version of the pack and up_

# AutoCraft (ad)
This datapack was developed for the AutoCraft Server, and has been in use since!

[The AutoCraft SMP Community Discord](https://discord.gg/B4Set59eKb)
![AutoCraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/985243802471ff2a2ae0da3bd87ed71c711e5721_0.webp)
